Compute the total plot height and inter-row margin fraction needed to lay out n_genes faceted boxplots over ncol columns without rows overlapping

Source: R/topgeneboxplot.R
topgeneBoxplotLayout.Rd

Compute the total plot height and inter-row margin fraction needed to lay out n_genes faceted boxplots over ncol columns without rows overlapping

Usage

topgeneBoxplotLayout(n_genes, ncol)

Arguments

n_genes

Number of gene facets being drawn

ncol

Number of facet columns

Value

A list with nrows, height (total plot height in pixels) and vertical_margin (top/bottom margin fraction to pass to subplot so the gap between rows is topgeneboxplot_gap_px regardless of height)

On this page
